title: Annual Health Checkup at the Clinic
title_zh: 在診所做年度健康檢查

all.en: My company requires every employee to take an annual health checkup at a partner clinic.
all.zh: 我們公司要求每位員工每年到合作的診所做一次健康檢查。

all.en: I arrived at seven in the morning because the blood tests must be done on an empty stomach.
all.zh: 我早上七點就到了，因為抽血必須空腹進行。

all.en: The nurse handed me a clipboard with a long list of questions about my lifestyle and family history.
all.zh: 護理師遞給我一個夾板，上面有一長串關於生活方式和家族病史的問題。

all.en: After registration, I was led to several rooms for different tests.
all.zh: 登記之後，我被帶到不同的房間做各項檢查。

all.en: They checked my blood pressure, heart rate, vision, and hearing one by one.
all.zh: 他們依序檢查了我的血壓、心跳、視力和聽力。

all.en: The chest X-ray only took a minute, but the ultrasound felt much longer.
all.zh: 胸部X光只花了一分鐘，但超音波感覺久得多。

all.en: I had to drink a strange chalky liquid before the stomach examination.
all.zh: 在胃部檢查前，我必須喝下一杯怪怪的、像粉筆水的液體。

all.en: The doctor reviewed my results and pointed out that my cholesterol was slightly high.
all.zh: 醫生看了我的報告，指出我的膽固醇偏高。

all.en: She suggested cutting back on fried food and adding more vegetables to every meal.
all.zh: 她建議我少吃油炸食物，並在每餐增加更多蔬菜。

all.en: I was relieved that nothing serious showed up, but I knew I needed to take her advice.
all.zh: 沒有發現嚴重問題讓我鬆了一口氣，但我知道必須聽從她的建議。

all.en: Before leaving, I scheduled a follow-up appointment for three months later.
all.zh: 離開前，我預約了三個月後的回診。

all.en: On the bus home, I made a quiet promise to take better care of my body this year.
all.zh: 在回家的公車上，我默默承諾今年要更好好照顧自己的身體。

all.en: Three months later, I returned to the clinic for my follow-up appointment as promised.
all.zh: 三個月後，我依約回到診所進行回診。

all.en: The same nurse remembered my name and asked how my diet changes had been going.
all.zh: 同一位護理師記得我的名字，還問我飲食調整進行得如何。

all.en: I proudly told her that I had been eating salads and grilled fish almost daily.
all.zh: 我自豪地告訴她，我幾乎每天都吃沙拉和烤魚。

all.en: The doctor ordered another blood test to compare my new cholesterol numbers.
all.zh: 醫生再次安排抽血，以便比較我新的膽固醇數值。

all.en: While waiting, I read a clinic pamphlet about heart-healthy habits for office workers.
all.zh: 等待時，我翻閱了一本關於上班族護心習慣的診所手冊。

all.en: The results showed that my cholesterol had dropped within the normal range again.
all.zh: 報告顯示我的膽固醇已經回到正常範圍內。

all.en: The doctor smiled warmly and praised my consistent efforts over the past months.
all.zh: 醫生溫暖地微笑，稱讚我這幾個月來持之以恆的努力。

all.en: She also encouraged me to start brisk walking for thirty minutes after dinner.
all.zh: 她也鼓勵我晚餐後開始快走三十分鐘。

all.en: My company gave me a small wellness bonus for completing all my health goals.
all.zh: 公司因為我達成所有健康目標，給了我一筆小小的健康獎金。

all.en: That evening, I treated myself to a bowl of yogurt with fresh berries instead of cake.
all.zh: 那天晚上，我用一碗優格配新鮮莓果犒賞自己，而不是吃蛋糕。

all.en: Inspired by the bonus, I decided to maintain my new habits well beyond the checkup.
all.zh: 受到獎金的激勵，我決定把這些新習慣持續到健康檢查之後。

all.en: Each morning, I prepared oatmeal with fresh fruit instead of my usual sugary cereal.
all.zh: 每天早上，我改用燕麥配新鮮水果，取代以往那些含糖的麥片。

all.en: I downloaded a step-counting app that gently reminded me to move every single hour.
all.zh: 我下載了一款計步應用程式，它會溫和地提醒我每小時起身活動。

all.en: During lunch breaks, I started taking brisk walks around the small park near the office.
all.zh: 午休時間，我開始繞著辦公室附近的小公園快走。

all.en: My colleagues teased me at first but soon began joining me for these walks.
all.zh: 同事一開始還取笑我，但很快也加入了我的散步行列。

all.en: At the next quarterly review, my blood sugar and cholesterol numbers had dropped significantly.
all.zh: 在下一季的複檢中，我的血糖和膽固醇數值都明顯下降了。

all.en: The doctor congratulated me and removed the warning notes from my medical file.
all.zh: 醫生恭喜我，並把我病歷上的警示備註拿掉了。

all.en: I called my mother that night to thank her for always emphasizing healthy living.
all.zh: 那天晚上，我打電話謝謝媽媽一直以來對健康生活的叮嚀。

all.en: She cried softly and promised to schedule her own long-postponed checkup the next week.
all.zh: 她輕聲哭了，並答應下週就去做那場拖了好久的健康檢查。

all.en: Health, I realized, was a quiet gift that you must remember to keep unwrapping.
all.zh: 我體會到，健康是一份安靜的禮物，必須記得不斷拆開享用。

all.en: One year later, my company invited a wellness expert to give a lunchtime talk about prevention.
all.zh: 一年後，公司邀請一位健康專家在午休時間演講關於預防保健的主題。

all.en: She shared simple slides about early signs of stress, fatigue, and silent chronic illnesses.
all.zh: 她用簡單的投影片介紹壓力、疲勞與沉默慢性病的早期徵兆。

all.en: I took careful notes and shared the key points with my parents over the weekend.
all.zh: 我認真做筆記，週末和父母分享其中的重點。

all.en: My father reluctantly agreed to schedule his first full checkup in nearly ten years.
all.zh: 我爸爸勉為其難地答應預約他將近十年來第一次完整健檢。

all.en: I accompanied him to the clinic and held his bag during every test on the long morning.
all.zh: 我陪他到診所，整個漫長的早上替他拿著包包進行各項檢查。

all.en: The doctor identified slightly elevated blood pressure and gave clear dietary recommendations.
all.zh: 醫生發現他血壓略高，並給出明確的飲食建議。

all.en: On the way home, my father admitted that he had been afraid of bad results for years.
all.zh: 回家路上，爸爸坦承自己這幾年都害怕檢查結果不好。

all.en: I promised to walk with him each evening to support his new healthier lifestyle.
all.zh: 我答應每晚陪他散步，支持他建立更健康的新生活。

all.en: Within three months, his blood pressure dropped, and he proudly showed off his new walking shoes.
all.zh: 三個月內，他的血壓下降了，他還驕傲地秀出他的新散步鞋。

all.en: Health, I realized again, becomes brighter when shared as a family responsibility and joy.
all.zh: 我再次體會到，當健康成為家人共同的責任與喜悅時，會變得更加明亮。

all.en: My company invited me to lead a monthly wellness circle for new staff after my recovery.
all.zh: 在我康復後，公司邀請我為新進員工帶領每月一次的健康小組。

all.en: I prepared simple handouts covering sleep, balanced meals, and stress management techniques.
all.zh: 我準備了簡單的講義，內容涵蓋睡眠、均衡飲食和壓力管理技巧。

all.en: Our first session attracted fifteen quiet new hires sipping warm tea in the meeting room.
all.zh: 我們第一場聚會吸引了十五位安靜的新員工，他們在會議室裡啜飲熱茶。

all.en: One nervous intern admitted she had never visited a doctor since arriving in our city.
all.zh: 一位緊張的實習生坦承，自從來到本市以後從未看過醫生。

all.en: I gently helped her schedule a checkup appointment at the same clinic that had helped me.
all.zh: 我溫柔地協助她預約了當初幫助我的那家診所做健康檢查。

all.en: Each week, we tried small changes, like adding fruit at breakfast or walking after lunch.
all.zh: 每週我們嘗試一些小改變，例如早餐加水果或午餐後散步。

all.en: Three months later, several members proudly shared their improved energy and lower stress levels.
all.zh: 三個月後，幾位成員自豪地分享他們精力提升、壓力下降的成果。

all.en: My manager mentioned that overall sick leave in our department had decreased significantly.
all.zh: 主管提到，我們部門整體的請病假天數明顯減少。

all.en: The wellness expert returned and invited me to co-host her next lunchtime company talk.
all.zh: 那位健康專家再次來訪，邀請我與她共同主持下一次的午間講座。

all.en: Caring for one's body, I now understood, slowly transformed the quiet culture of a workplace.
all.zh: 我現在明白，照顧好身體，能慢慢轉變一個職場的安靜文化。

all.en: Our wellness lunchtime talks grew into a regular monthly series with growing attendance every season.
all.zh: 我們的午間健康講座成長為固定的每月系列，每一季出席人數都在增加。

all.en: The wellness expert and I gently invited guest speakers, including a nutritionist and a sleep researcher.
all.zh: 健康專家與我溫柔地邀請客座講者，包括營養師和睡眠研究員。

all.en: Colleagues started cooking gentle vegetable lunches together on Wednesdays inside our small office kitchen.
all.zh: 同事們開始每週三在我們小小的辦公室廚房一起烹煮溫柔的蔬菜午餐。

all.en: Our department's quarterly sick leave numbers dropped to the lowest level the company had ever recorded.
all.zh: 我們部門的季度請病假天數降至公司有史以來最低的紀錄。

all.en: Human resources asked me to help write a gentle wellness policy for every department across the company.
all.zh: 人資請我協助為公司各部門撰寫一份溫柔的健康政策。

all.en: I included paragraphs about flexible breaks, walking meetings, and respect for personal medical appointments.
all.zh: 我納入了關於彈性休息、走路會議與尊重個人就醫時間的段落。

all.en: Other companies in the city asked permission to adapt our policy for their own kindhearted workplaces.
all.zh: 市內其他公司請求授權，將我們的政策改寫適用於他們善心的職場。

all.en: A national magazine featured our quiet office in an article called Kindness at Work, Wellness at Home.
all.zh: 一家全國雜誌在一篇名為《職場的善意，家中的健康》的文章中專題報導我們安靜的辦公室。

all.en: I attended my next annual checkup feeling lighter, calmer, and quietly proud of our gentle company culture.
all.zh: 我去做下一次年度健檢時，感覺更輕盈、更平靜，也默默為我們溫柔的公司文化感到驕傲。

all.en: One small health checkup had truly grown into a citywide ripple of gentle and patient workplace wellness.
all.zh: 一次小小的健檢，真正擴散成一道遍及全市、溫柔耐心的職場健康漣漪。

all.en: The mayor's office invited our wellness circle to help shape a public health initiative across town.
all.zh: 市長辦公室邀請我們的健康小組協助規劃一項全市的公共衛生計畫。

all.en: We worked alongside city nurses to design simple posters about preventive care for busy neighborhoods.
all.zh: 我們與市府護理師合作，為忙碌的社區設計簡單的預防保健海報。

all.en: Local libraries hung the posters near their entrances and offered short evening reading sessions.
all.zh: 當地圖書館把海報掛在入口附近，並舉辦短時間的傍晚閱讀活動。

all.en: Hundreds of residents booked their first ever annual checkup after seeing our gentle reminders.
all.zh: 數百名居民在看到我們溫柔的提醒後，預約了他們第一次的年度健檢。

all.en: I received a small civic award from the city council for promoting kindhearted preventive health.
all.zh: 我獲得市議會頒發的小型公民獎，以表彰我推廣善心預防保健的努力。

all.en: On stage, I humbly thanked the nurse who first handed me that long clipboard years ago.
all.zh: 在台上，我謙遜地感謝多年前第一個遞給我那長長夾板的護理師。

all.en: She watched from the front row, wiping her eyes quietly with a folded paper tissue.
all.zh: 她坐在第一排觀看，安靜地用摺好的紙巾擦拭眼淚。

all.en: My parents joined a senior walking group that met three mornings a week at the riverside.
all.zh: 我的父母加入了一個年長者的散步團體，每週三個早上在河濱碰面。

all.en: They proudly wore matching caps embroidered with the words Health is the Quietest Wealth.
all.zh: 他們驕傲地戴著繡有「健康是最安靜的財富」字樣的成套帽子。

all.en: Looking at them, I knew one ordinary morning checkup had truly become a lifelong family habit.
all.zh: 看著他們，我知道一場平凡的晨間健檢，真正成為一個延續一生的家庭習慣。

all.en: The walking group expanded to forty members within only one quiet sunny spring season.
all.zh: 那個散步團體在一個安靜陽光的春季就擴展到四十位成員。

all.en: A retired teacher kept a small notebook tracking everyone's gentle weekly progress along the riverside path.
all.zh: 一位退休老師用一本小筆記本，記錄每位成員沿河岸小徑每週溫和的進步。

all.en: City council members began joining for short morning strolls before their early Tuesday meetings.
all.zh: 市議會的議員們在週二早會前，也開始加入短暫的晨間散步。

all.en: We installed three new wooden benches along the path, each donated by a grateful local family.
all.zh: 我們沿著步道增設了三張新的木椅，每一張都是由心懷感激的當地家庭所捐贈。

all.en: On winter mornings, volunteers brought thermoses of warm ginger tea for the older walkers.
all.zh: 在冬日早晨，志工們會為年長的散步者帶來保溫瓶裡溫熱的薑茶。

all.en: Our company sponsored an annual gentle health fair held inside the renovated riverside park pavilion.
all.zh: 我們公司贊助了一場年度溫和的健康博覽會，於翻新後的河濱公園涼亭內舉行。

all.en: Volunteer doctors offered free blood pressure checks beside booths selling fresh seasonal fruit baskets.
all.zh: 志工醫師在販售當令水果籃的攤位旁提供免費血壓量測。

all.en: Children attended a small interactive learning corner about nutrition, hydration, and proper handwashing.
all.zh: 孩子們前往一個小型互動學習角落，認識營養、補水與正確的洗手方法。

all.en: By the third year, attendance at the fair had grown to nearly two thousand cheerful neighborhood residents.
all.zh: 到了第三年，博覽會的出席人數已成長至將近兩千位開朗的社區居民。

all.en: I walked home that evening with my parents, knowing health and kindness had truly become inseparable companions.
all.zh: 那天傍晚我與父母一同走路回家，知道健康與善意已真正成為密不可分的夥伴。

all.en: This year, I almost skipped my checkup because of a busy project deadline at work.
all.zh: 今年我差點因為工作上忙碌的專案截止日而跳過健檢。

all.en: My mom called the night before and gently reminded me that no deadline mattered more than my body.
all.zh: 前一晚媽媽打來電話，溫柔地提醒我，沒有任何截止日比我的身體更重要。

all.en: I rescheduled a meeting at six in the morning and made it to the clinic by seven on the dot.
all.zh: 我把早上六點的會議改期，準時七點到了診所。

all.en: The same nurse who had remembered my name years ago handed me the clipboard with a familiar smile.
all.zh: 多年前記得我名字的那位護理師，帶著熟悉的微笑遞給我那個夾板。

all.en: This time, I added a question of my own at the end about how to manage screen-related eye strain.
all.zh: 這次我在最後加了一個自己的問題，請教如何處理長時間看螢幕造成的眼睛疲勞。

all.en: The doctor was happy to spend an extra five minutes explaining the 20-20-20 rule to me.
all.zh: 醫生很樂意多花五分鐘為我講解 20-20-20 護眼法則。

all.en: On the way out, I bumped into a colleague who had finally come for his first checkup ever.
all.zh: 離開時我撞見一位同事，他終於來做了人生第一次健檢。

all.en: He looked nervous, so I sat with him in the waiting area until his name was called.
all.zh: 他看起來很緊張，所以我陪他在候診區坐到他被叫號為止。

all.en: We agreed to text each other our results that evening to celebrate or comfort each other accordingly.
all.zh: 我們約好當晚互傳檢查結果，依情況一起慶祝或互相安慰。

all.en: Caring for our bodies, I realized again, was always a little easier when shared with another quiet friend.
all.zh: 我再次體會到，照顧自己的身體，只要有另一位安靜的朋友相伴，總是會輕鬆一些。

all.en: I skipped breakfast and felt my stomach growling in the waiting room.
all.zh: 我沒吃早餐，在候診室裡聽見自己的肚子在咕嚕叫。

all.en: The nurse weighed me first and then measured my height and blood pressure.
all.zh: 護理師先幫我量體重，接著量身高和血壓。

all.en: Giving blood always makes me dizzy, so I looked away from the needle.
all.zh: 抽血總是讓我頭暈，所以我把視線從針頭移開。

all.en: The doctor pressed gently on my stomach and asked if it hurt anywhere.
all.zh: 醫生輕輕按壓我的腹部，問哪裡會不會痛。

all.en: I had to drink a strange liquid before the ultrasound scan.
all.zh: 在做超音波檢查之前，我得喝下一種奇怪的液體。

all.en: The questions about my diet made me realize I eat too much fast food.
all.zh: 關於飲食的問題讓我意識到自己吃了太多速食。

all.en: My results will be mailed to me within about two weeks.
all.zh: 我的檢查結果大約兩週內會郵寄給我。

all.en: The doctor advised me to walk thirty minutes every single day.
all.zh: 醫生建議我每天都走路三十分鐘。

all.en: I promised myself to cut down on coffee and salt this year.
all.zh: 我答應自己今年要減少咖啡和鹽的攝取。

all.en: Leaving the clinic, I finally treated myself to a long-awaited breakfast.
all.zh: 離開診所時，我終於犒賞自己一頓期待已久的早餐。
